_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The coil has produced zero ±2-point moves across 48 windows, so HOLD with conviction is the skilled call — Disbelief is the adjacent rung the analyst identifies as the next likely phase if capital formation begins, but no breaker has fired yet.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls Disbelief with medium conviction and explicit HOLD direction; narrative implies recovery toward Hope without specifying a phase, creating a forward-call split
next_move.confirmed_if: stablecoin_growth rises above 45 AND funding drops below 40 with BTC holding $62k — signals real capital formation deepening Disbelief toward Hope
next_move.invalidated_if: funding spikes above 65 OR ETF flows drop below 70 with BTC breaking below $60k — flips to Anxiety with leverage washout, or VIX >22 with DXY >103 forcing Panic
